content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services built around what boat owners actually need — reliable work done right, without the runaround. From the Chesapeake Bay to the waters of South Florida, we bring hands-on expertise and a straightforward approach to every job.

Our team handles everything from detailed boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before buying a vessel, underwater hull work without hauling out, a cooling system that actually keeps up with summer heat, or sanitation systems that meet current standards, Ben's Boatworks has the skills and equipment to get it done properly.

We serve boat owners across Annapolis, the greater Chesapeake region, and throughout our South Florida service area — covering a wide range of vessels from coastal cruisers to liveaboards. Your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. We've built our reputation on consistent, quality work and honest communication with every customer we work with. If you're looking for a marine services partner who shows up and gets the job done, we're glad you found us.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call for a quote today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers structural integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and overall vessel condition — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers an accurate picture of what they're working with. Pre-purchase inspections help identify issues before they become expensive problems, and condition-and-value surveys are often required for insurance or financing. Ben's Boatworks delivers detailed, documented inspections you can actually use.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater services allow hull cleaning, inspection, prop work, zinc replacement, and through-hull checks to be completed without the cost and hassle of hauling the vessel out of the water. Regular underwater maintenance keeps marine growth from degrading performance and protects running gear from corrosion. Ben's Boatworks handles in-water diving work efficiently so your boat stays where it belongs.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems require specialized knowledge — saltwater cooling circuits, refrigerant handling, and the compact installations found on boats demand a different skill set than residential HVAC work. Proper maintenance and repair of marine climate control systems keeps onboard comfort consistent and prevents breakdowns during peak season. Ben's Boatworks services, repairs, and troubleshoots marine AC units across a wide range of vessel types.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation systems include holding tanks, marine heads, raw water systems, bilge pumps, and through-hull fittings — all of which require proper installation and maintenance to function safely and stay compliant with discharge regulations. A failing sanitation system can create serious health, legal, and odor issues aboard any vessel. Ben's Boatworks repairs and upgrades marine plumbing and sanitation systems to keep everything running cleanly and correctly.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection before closing
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine AC system repair and refrigerant recharge for summer cruising
Holding tank replacement and marine head overhaul for sanitation compliance
Through-hull fitting inspection and seacock service during diving visit
Insurance survey documenting vessel value and safety equipment condition
Raw water cooling system flush and marine plumbing leak diagnosis
